name: sms.to
description: Cyprus-based SMS and WhatsApp messaging API with multi-channel integrations and global delivery.

seo.title: sms.to — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: sms.to: Cyprus-based SMS and WhatsApp messaging API with multi-channel integrations and global delivery.

when_to_use: Global SMS delivery with multi-channel fallback
WhatsApp and SMS combined messaging API
OTP delivery via SMS and WhatsApp from single API
Bulk promotional SMS for e-commerce campaigns
Two-way messaging for customer engagement flows

pros: Multi-channel SMS and WhatsApp via single API
cons: Brand less known than Twilio or MessageBird
Docs and dashboards functional but not polished
Advanced features limited vs enterprise CPaaS
review.verdict: Usable global SMS/WhatsApp API for small and mid-sized senders — reasonable price, modest bells and whistles.
review.best_for: SMBs and no-code builders sending global SMS and WhatsApp with simple needs
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep analytics, compliance tooling and top-tier SLAs
